sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n29386" key="duspenqe/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">δυσπενθ-έω</orth>, <sense id="n29386.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">to be sore afflicted</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.106a</biblScope> </bibl> (v.l.).</sense> </entryFree>
